items.title: Tropic Trooper Uses Trojanized SumatraPDF and GitHub to Deploy AdaptixC2
items.summary: Chinese-speaking individuals are the target of a new campaign that uses a trojanized version of SumatraPDF reader to deploy the AdaptixC2 Beacon post-exploitation agent and ultimately facilitate the abuse of Microsoft Vi...

items.title: Microsoft now lets admins uninstall Copilot on enterprise devices
items.summary: Microsoft says IT administrators can now uninstall the AI-powered Copilot digital assistant from enterprise devices using a new policy setting, which has become broadly available after the April 2026 Patch Tuesday. [...]
